---
title: "A Note to Vasco and Kenji"
description: "Keeping the running regime up — for the next pickup basketball game."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-05-18"
categories: [personal, photo, running]
image: cover.jpg
---

![With Vasco and Kenji.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Vasco and Kenji: perhaps someday we can pick up a basketball game like old time! (I'm keeping my running regime just for you guys)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_vasco-and-kenji-perhaps-someday-we-can-pick-activity-6535352595635150848-qlyQ).*
